name: bat
description:
Hey so, update, I'm kinda taking this bot down.

The requester seems to have requested a similar if not exactly the same as a bit aatroxie has made but with Soap instead of Price. They even referred to the same place as a reference.

Could it be a coincidence? Maybe, but even so I don't want to have the bot up if it wasn't.

If you like a bot a creator has made, DONT REQUEST ANOTHER CREATOR TO REMAKE IT. If you want it with a different character, try requesting for it from the same person.

I'll be leaving this up as a little reminder, and I am sorry to anybody who liked the bot, but I don't want to have this up with the similarities that even just the surface had.
creator: MikeyBoneEevee
